extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won Stage 4 mountain finish after American domestique KUSS Sepp delivered devastating high-pace leadout inside final 2km.
tactical_patterns: KUSS Sepp's sustained high pace inside 2km immediately cracked KWIATKOWSKI, proving American climbers excel at paced leadouts not just tempo.
MARTIN Guillaume's late attack sub-300m forced ROGLIC response but everyone received same time despite visible gaps, revealing commissaire lenience.
Early breakaway sprint at 51.5km saw POLITT Nils prioritize KOM points over sprint, signaling teams letting non-GC riders establish jersey competitions.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: boxed himself in intermediate sprint finishing 12th, tactical awareness declining despite green jersey priority
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: delivered race-winning leadout on mountain finish, American shown capable of decisive high-mountain pace-setting for GC leader
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: immediately cracked when KUSS accelerated inside 2km, showing vulnerability to sustained high pace before finale
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: positive: attacked sub-300m on Category 1 finish for podium, revealing ambition beyond domestique role for COFIDIS
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: finished 4th after injury return, immediately competitive in GC group contrary to written-off narrative
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: 10th place attributed to being 'light little man' struggling against heavyweights, weight disadvantage on power climbs
